current_flat_highlight_issue.cause: The selected parcel focus GraphicsLayer used relative-to-ground elevation with a 45 meter offset, and the parcel boundary used a flat simple-fill polygon symbol.
current_flat_highlight_issue.effect: The selected parcel boundary could read as a floating sheet in the 3D SceneView.

symbol_and_elevation_approach.focus_layer_elevation: Changed selected parcel focus layer elevationInfo to on-the-ground.
symbol_and_elevation_approach.highlight_symbol: Changed selected parcel boundary symbol from simple-fill to polygon-3d with an extrude symbol layer.
symbol_and_elevation_approach.material: Translucent cyan fill so buildings/property context remain visible.
symbol_and_elevation_approach.edges: Solid warm-gold edges define footprint, top outline, and vertical cage edges.

polygon_support: Existing GeoJSON Polygon conversion path preserved.
Existing GeoJSON MultiPolygon conversion path preserved.
Existing clear-and-replace selected parcel focus layer behavior preserved.
runtime_cleanup: Added ArcGIS reactiveUtils to the local runtime loader.
Changed parcel focus marker zoom scaling listener from deprecated SceneView.watch to reactiveUtils.watch.

manual_smoke_test.reason: The in-app browser automation timed out on navigation while the local dev server remained available.
recommended_checks: Confirm the parcel highlight reads as a translucent low cage rather than a flat floating sheet.
Confirm buildings remain visible through the cage.
Select another parcel and confirm the old cage clears.
Confirm hotspot markers still render and click selection still works.

remaining_3d_sceneview_polish: Tune cage height and opacity after visual inspection against real parcels with dense building footprints.
Consider separate ground footprint and top-edge graphics if ArcGIS extrusion edges need finer styling.
